about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I am a developer and problem solver passionate about bridging technology with real-world requirements.

paragraph2.highlight: formulate business and general problems into technology solutions
paragraph2.suffix: that create a meaningful, positive, and direct impact for users.

about.paragraph3: Through a user-centric approach and technical efficiency, I am committed to driving projects from initial concepts to successful, highly practical implementations.
